description: Turn any OpenAPI/Swagger spec into an MCP server - every API operation becomes an agent tool.
name: io.github.sani-savaliya/agentify

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Sent to the upstream API as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for the upstream API. Sent as a header (name auto-discovered from the spec's security schemes, default X-API-Key).
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the header name used for AGENTIFY_API_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_API_KEY_HEADER

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Send AGENTIFY_API_KEY as this query parameter instead of a header.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_API_KEY_QUERY

environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTP basic auth username (pair with AGENTIFY_BASIC_PASS).
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_BASIC_USER

environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTP basic auth password (pair with AGENTIFY_BASIC_USER).
environmentVariables.name: AGENTIFY_BASIC_PASS

packageArguments.description: URL or file path of the OpenAPI/Swagger spec (3.x or 2.0, JSON or YAML). Every operation becomes an MCP tool.
